expectations.evidence: Three separate $: blocks are used: one for drums, one for bassline, one for melody

expectations.text: Includes drum pattern with bd and other elements
expectations.evidence: s("bd*4, [~ cp]*2, [~ hh]*4").bank("RolandTR909") — kick, clap, and hi-hat all present
note("<c2 eb2>*4").s("sawtooth") provides a synthesised bassline at octave 2
"bd*4" — four-on-the-floor kick — is used, and setcpm(128/4) sets 128 BPM house tempo

expectations.text: Uses at least one audio effect
